title: Clinical Co-Pilot Fact
description: The one canonical Fact shape (ARCHITECTURE_COMPLETE.md "Fact object"). Every capability output, tool result, digest input, LLM prompt fact, and verifier check (V2-V4) operates on this shape. This schema, not the PHP implementation, is the contract (ARCHITECTURE.md R3).

fact_id.description: hash(capability, kind, citations, canonical value) -- value included so a preloaded fact and a later re-fetch of the same datum with a corrected value never collide (T19).

capability_version.description: Digest input. A capability_version bump regenerates every doc whose fact set includes that capability's facts (E5).

pid.description: Asserted on tool return (I10) and re-verified per citation (V3).

clinical_date.description: ISO-8601 calendar date per C1 precedence; null only for kinds without a timeline.

date_source.description: C1: collected = authoritative specimen-collection date; fallback = substituted only because no collection date exists.

value.description: Present on result/trend_point/vital kinds; null otherwise.

raw.description: Verbatim from the chart, length-bounded (procedure_result.result is varchar(255)).

parsed.description: null means no numeric claim is permitted (C3).

comparator.description: Non-none means the value is censored: parsed is a bound its direction proves, never an exact reading.

unit_original.description: '' is allowed; then parsed math is banned (C4, no unit no math).

conversion_version.description: C4 whitelist version, a digest input; non-null only if a unit conversion was actually applied.
